title: MAGICAL GIRL SITE
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (production doA, 2018). Manga complete at 141 chapters / 16 volumes per AniList (some fan sources cite 139 for the same complete run; the discrepancy is bonus/renumbered installments). The anime follows the manga fairly closely through roughly chapter 46 (Nijimin's funeral), then diverges into an anime-original ending for its final episode(s) rather than adapting further chapters. Chapters 47-141 continue the manga-only story past that divergence point.

mappings.arc: Magical Girl Site (TV adaptation, diverges before the finale)
